message:
feat(enum): implement SqlEnum derive macro and enum type support (bd-3dw4)

Add complete enum type support for SQLModel Rust:
- SqlType::Enum variant for representing enum column types
- SqlEnum trait (to_sql_str, from_sql_str, VARIANTS, TYPE_NAME)
- #[derive(SqlEnum)] proc macro generating SqlEnum impl, Value conversions,
  Display, and FromStr
- Support for #[sqlmodel(rename = "...")] on variants for custom SQL names
- Re-export SqlEnum from facade crate and prelude

Enums are stored as TEXT in the database with string values derived from
snake_case variant names. Dialect-specific DDL (CREATE TYPE for Postgres,
ENUM() for MySQL, CHECK for SQLite) is a follow-up task.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
